name: Oatmeal Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup All-purpose flour (or whole wheat flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream Golden Crisco shortening, sugars, and eggs in a large bowl on medium speed of an electric mixer or with a wooden spoon until light and creamy, about 2 minutes.
3. Combine oats, flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, beating on low speed or with a spoon until well blended, about 1 minute.
5. Stir in nuts and chocolate chunks (or jumbo chips).
6. Drop dough by heaping tablespoonfuls (approximately 15 mL) onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown. Makes: About 30 cookies Freezing: Excellent
